description: These high ankle slip on boots from the house of ganuchi, made of fine suede in camel brown are a must have - whether you are looking for shoes to go with your denims or a pair to wear while you are out unwinding with your friends. UpperSuede upper with stitch detailing for absolute comfort, durability and styleFabric inner lining for breathable, all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in sand grain texture for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careRemove dust and dirt using a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
